attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WCASL.BATCH_ID                      
,WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
,WCASL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT              
,WCASL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,WCASL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
,WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
,WCASL.AE_HEADER_ID                  
,WCASL.AE_LINE_NUM                   
,WCASL.AMOUNT                        
,WCASL.APPLICATION_ID                
,WCASL.ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
,WCASL.BATCH_SOURCE                  
,WCASL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,WCASL.BOOKING_PERCENT               
,WCASL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,WCASL.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
,WCASL.COGS_REV_GL_DATE              
,WCASL.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
,WCASL.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS         
,WCASL.CONVERSION_TYPE               
,WCASL.CREATED_BY                    
,WCASL.CREATION_DATE                 
,WCASL.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,WCASL.CURRENCY_PRECISION            
,WCASL.CUSTOMER_NAME                 
,WCASL.CUSTOMER_NUMBER               
,WCASL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,WCASL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,WCASL.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID          
,WCASL.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
,WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE                 
,WCASL.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
,WCASL.EDW_EXTRACTED_FLAG            
,WCASL.EVENT_ID                      
,WCASL.EVENT_TYPE                    
,WCASL.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,WCASL.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,WCASL.GL_DATE                       
,WCASL.GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
,WCASL.GL_POSTED_DATE                
,WCASL.GL_POSTED_FLAG                
,WCASL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,WCASL.GROUPING_ID                   
,WCASL.HEADER_ID                     
,WCASL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,WCASL.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,WCASL.INVOICE_TYPE                  
,WCASL.JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
,WCASL.JE_SOURCE_NAME                
,WCASL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,WCASL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,WCASL.LEDGER_ID                     
,WCASL.LINE_COGS_AMOUNT              
,WCASL.LINE_ID                       
,WCASL.LINE_TYPE 
,WCASL.MERAKI_FLAG                    
,WCASL.OA_SKU_TYPE                   
,WCASL.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,WCASL.ORG_ID                        
,WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ                   
,WCASL.PERIOD_NAME                   
,WCASL.PROCESS_ID                    
,WCASL.PROFILE_ID                    
,WCASL.RAO_CREATED_BY                
,WCASL.RAO_CREATION_DATE             
,WCASL.RAO_LAST_UPDATE_DATE          
,WCASL.RAO_LAST_UPDATED_BY           
,WCASL.RECOGNIZED_BOOKING_PCT        
,WCASL.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID            
,WCASL.SEGMENT1                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT10                     
,WCASL.SEGMENT2                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT3                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT4                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT5                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT6                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT7                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT8                      
,WCASL.SEGMENT9                      
,WCASL.SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
,WCASL.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
,WCASL.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5              
,WCASL.SUMMARY_ID                    
,WCASL.TRX_CLASS                     
,WCASL.TRX_DATE                      
,WCASL.TRX_NUMBER                    
,WCASL.TSV_FLAG                      
,WCASL.UNIQUE_ID                     
,WCASL.USD_CONV_RATE                 
,WCASL.WEBEX_FLAG                    
,WCASL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            
,WCASL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,WCASL.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
 FROM
  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS WCASL
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WCASL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON WCASL.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
  WHERE 1=1
   AND WCASL.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
   AND COALESCE(WCASL.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
   
  AND
 ( NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 
   FROM $$WORKDB.W_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE WRACL
  WHERE WRACL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
  AND WRACL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
  WHERE NRAGD.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT=WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
     AND NRAGD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	 )

SELECT 
    NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
    SRASL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
    COALESCE(WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER,-999) as SCHEDULE_LINE_NUM_INT,
    COALESCE(WCASL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') as ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD,
    WCASL.GL_DATE as GL_DTM,
    COALESCE(WCASL.CATCHUP_FLAG,'=') as CATCHUP_FLG,
	/* REVISIT SCHEDULE_LINE_TRNSCTNL_AMT LOGIC */
  CASE WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN -1 * WCASL.AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN WCASL.AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN  WCASL.AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN -1 * WCASL.AMOUNT        
    ELSE WCASL.AMOUNT
  END AS SCHEDULE_LINE_TRNSCTNL_AMT,
  /* REVISIT SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT LOGIC */
  CASE WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN -1 * WCASL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN WCASL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN  WCASL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT          
    WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN -1 * WCASL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
    ELSE WCASL.AMOUNT         
  END AS SCHEDULE_LINE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    COALESCE(WCASL.ERROR_FLAG,'=') as ERROR_FLG,
    COALESCE(WCASL.STD_GL_POSTED_FLAG ,'=') as GL_POSTED_ROLE, 
    CASE WHEN  WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 
      COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, -995) ELSE -995 END AS CREDIT_GLA_KEY,
    CASE WHEN  WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 
      COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, -995) ELSE -995 END AS DEBIT_GLA_KEY,
    CASE WHEN WCASL.CURRENCY_CODE IS NULL OR trim(WCASL.CURRENCY_CODE) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE WCASL.CURRENCY_CODE END as CURRENCY_CODE,
    COALESCE(NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNK'),
    CASE WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 
     COALESCE(NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,-7777) ELSE RANDOM(1010000,1011800) * -1 END CRE_RAE_SUMMARY_KEY,
    CASE WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS','UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN 
     COALESCE(NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY,-7777) ELSE RANDOM(1010000,1011800) * -1 END DEB_RAE_SUMMARY_KEY, 
    WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID as SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT,
    NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
  COALESCE(CASE WHEN  WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN -1 * ABS(WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ)          
       WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD','DEFERRED_COGS') THEN ABS(WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ)          
       WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'C' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN  ABS(WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ)          
       WHEN WCASL.DIST_BAL_TYPE = 'D' AND WCASL.ACCOUNT_CLASS IN  ('UNEARNED_REVENUE','REVENUE') THEN -1 * ABS(WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ)    
       ELSE WCASL.PERCENT_ADJ      
   END,0) as ADJUSTMENT_LINE_PCT,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
    USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
    
    CASE WHEN (WCASL.OA_SKU_TYPE = 'SUB' AND NRA.ASSOCIATION_TYPE='TRANSACTION_LINE') THEN COALESCE(WCASL.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID,-999)
	      ELSE CAST(-999 AS INTEGER ) END as SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    CASE WHEN (WCASL.OA_SKU_TYPE = 'SUB' AND NRA.ASSOCIATION_TYPE='TRANSACTION_LINE') THEN COALESCE(WCASL.LINE_ID,-999)  
	      ELSE CAST(-999 AS INTEGER ) END as OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
    'I' ACTION_CODE,
    'I' DML_TYPE
    FROM
  (SELECT
   XCAL.BATCH_ID                      
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
  ,XCAL.ORG_ID                        
  ,XCAL.APPLICATION_ID                
  ,XCAL.LEDGER_ID                     
  ,XCAL.CURRENCY_CODE                 
  ,XCAL.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
  ,XCAL.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
  ,XCAL.CONVERSION_TYPE               
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
  ,XCAL.GL_DATE                       
  ,XCAL.AMOUNT                                     
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
  ,XCAL.PERCENT_ADJ                   
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
  ,XCAL.GL_POSTED_FLAG                
  ,'=' AS CATCHUP_FLAG /* XCAL.CATCHUP_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */              
  ,'=' AS STD_GL_POSTED_FLAG /* XCAL.STD_GL_POSTED_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */          
  ,XCAL.EVENT_ID                      
  ,XCAL.EVENT_TYPE                    
  ,XCAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID                              
  ,XCAL.JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
  ,XCAL.JE_SOURCE_NAME                
  ,XCAL.PERIOD_NAME                   
  ,XCAL.GL_POSTED_DATE                
  ,XCAL.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
  ,XCAL.SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
  ,XCAL.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
  ,XCAL.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID 
  ,'=' AS ERROR_FLAG /* XCAL.ERROR_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */                    
  ,XCAL.GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
  ,XCAL.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
  ,XCAL.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
  ,XCAL.COGS_REV_GL_DATE                          
  ,XCAL.LINE_ID                      
  ,XCAL.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID                                      
  ,XCAL.OA_SKU_TYPE                                                            
  ,XCAL.CREATED_BY                    
  ,XCAL.CREATION_DATE                 
  ,XCAL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
  ,XCAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                         
  ,XCAL.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
  ,XCAL.GLOBAL_NAME
  ,XCAL.BATCH_SOURCE
  ,XCAL.DIST_BAL_TYPE  
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,XCAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME               
  ,XCAL.ACTION_CODE
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS XCAL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
   XCAL.BATCH_ID                      
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
  ,XCAL.ORG_ID                        
  ,XCAL.APPLICATION_ID                
  ,XCAL.LEDGER_ID                     
  ,XCAL.CURRENCY_CODE                 
  ,XCAL.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
  ,XCAL.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
  ,XCAL.CONVERSION_TYPE               
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
  ,XCAL.GL_DATE                       
  ,XCAL.AMOUNT                                     
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
  ,XCAL.PERCENT_ADJ                   
  ,XCAL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
  ,XCAL.GL_POSTED_FLAG                
  ,'=' AS CATCHUP_FLAG /* XCAL.CATCHUP_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */              
  ,'=' AS STD_GL_POSTED_FLAG /* XCAL.STD_GL_POSTED_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */          
  ,XCAL.EVENT_ID                      
  ,XCAL.EVENT_TYPE                    
  ,XCAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID                              
  ,XCAL.JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
  ,XCAL.JE_SOURCE_NAME                
  ,XCAL.PERIOD_NAME                   
  ,XCAL.GL_POSTED_DATE                
  ,XCAL.SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
  ,XCAL.SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
  ,XCAL.DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
  ,XCAL.DESTINATION_BATCH_ID 
  ,'=' AS ERROR_FLAG /* XCAL.ERROR_FLAG : Not able to find this attribute in RAO */                    
  ,XCAL.GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
  ,XCAL.COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
  ,XCAL.COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
  ,XCAL.COGS_REV_GL_DATE                          
  ,XCAL.LINE_ID                      
  ,XCAL.ROL_TRANSACTION_ID                                      
  ,XCAL.OA_SKU_TYPE                                                            
  ,XCAL.CREATED_BY                    
  ,XCAL.CREATION_DATE                 
  ,XCAL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
  ,XCAL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                         
  ,XCAL.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
  ,XCAL.GLOBAL_NAME
  ,XCAL.BATCH_SOURCE  
  ,XCAL.DIST_BAL_TYPE  
  ,XCAL.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,XCAL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME               
  ,XCAL.ACTION_CODE 
  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHDL_LINE XCAL
  ) WCASL
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WCASL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHDL_LINE SRASL
   ON WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID = SRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT 
   AND SRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
   ON NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT= WCASL.ORG_ID
   AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='CISCO'
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA
   ON WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_ID =NRA. SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT 
   AND NRA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON WCASL.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
    ON NGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID=WCASL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
     AND NGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = WCASL.GLOBAL_NAME 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
   ON NRAGD.SK_SUMMARY_ID_INT=WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
      AND NRAGD.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER GL WHERE WCASL.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND WCASL.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(WCASL.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'

SELECT RANK() OVER(
 ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID) + SRASLKEY.MAX_VAL RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 COALESCE(WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,-999) SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_LINT,
 COALESCE(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,'UNK') SS_CODE
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SRASL. RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
  
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHDL_LINE SRASL ) SRASLKEY,
 (
 SELECT GLOBAL_NAME,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,APPLICATION_ID,GL_POSTED_DATE,GL_POSTED_FLAG,LEDGER_ID 
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LINE_DTLS) WCASL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WCASL.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR  EFAA
  ON WCASL.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID 
  AND UPPER(EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME) = 'REVENUE ACCOUNTING ENGINE'
  
 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER GL WHERE WCASL.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND WCASL.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(WCASL.GL_POSTED_FLAG, 'N') = 'Y'
  
  AND
   NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHDL_LINE SRASL
    WHERE SRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND SRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = WCASL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID)
